title: Account
description: JSON template for Analytics account entry.

childLink.description: Child link for an account entry. Points to the list of web properties for this account.

href.description: Link to the list of web properties for this account.

type.description: Type of the child link. Its value is "analytics#webproperties".

permissions.description: Permissions the user has for this account.

effective.description: All the permissions that the user has for this account. These include any implied permissions (e.g., EDIT implies VIEW).

starred.description: Indicates whether this account is starred or not.

updated.description: Time the account was last modified.
